summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Arena application with RainbowKit wallet integration and Auto-FOMO Engine. All core features working excellently including backend health checks, FOMO Engine APIs, wallet connection, and navigation.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 instead of expected 404 for invalid position ID
minor_issues.impact: Very minor - error handling works but status code differs

console_warnings.issue: Unknown prop 'active' being sent to DOM - styled-components warning
console_warnings.impact: No functional impact, just console warnings

console_warnings.issue: 403 error when fetching remote project configuration
console_warnings.impact: Falls back to local/default values, no functional impact

passed_tests: Backend health check (/api/health) - 200 OK
FOMO Engine Stats (/api/fomo/stats) - 200 OK
FOMO Engine Best Signal (/api/fomo/best-signal) - 200 OK
FOMO Engine Events (/api/fomo/events) - 200 OK
Monetization pricing endpoint working
Boosted bets endpoint working
Featured duels endpoint working
Invalid ObjectId handling returns 400 correctly
Frontend loads correctly with FOMO Arena branding
Connect Wallet button visible and clickable
RainbowKit modal opens successfully
RainbowKit shows MetaMask and WalletConnect options
Arena navigation tab works - shows prediction markets interface
Duels navigation tab works - shows duels interface with summary
Analyst Leagues navigation tab works - shows leaderboard with ROI/accuracy
All navigation tabs clickable and functional
Main content areas and header/navigation present
No critical error messages on page
Wallet Infrastructure Layer with RainbowKit + wagmi implemented
Auto-FOMO Engine backend module created and responding
